name: Cocoa Cupcakes
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking soda. In a large bowl, mix cocoa, vegetable oil, vinegar, and vanilla until well combined. Gradually add cold water, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Pour batter into muffin tins lined with wax paper. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
